creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

Now: 

<https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo>

> … There currently are no publicly-advertised Mailman mailing lists 
> on lists.freebsd.org. …

Redirection from <https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-ports-announce> makes sense. 

> … This month's 
> <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2021-July/000295.html> 
> was copied to freebsd-ports-announce

Hmm, maybe I fell asleep part-way through that paragraph. Did I wonder why I could not find an archive in the freebsd-ports-announce area? We'll never know :-)

----

In any case: I reckon, this bug is superseded by bug 259221 where we have a 404.
